3025540.name: The Quarantine
3025540.description:
"Embrace the light — because the endless night will consume you."

In 'The Quarantine,' you face a post-apocalyptic world overrun by monstrous creatures. They must fortify their home, scavenging for resources to craft survival tools while evading lurking threats. With strategic resource management and tense survival gameplay, every decision is crucial.

Can you survive the endless night?

The City of Kaslipell

Once an ordinary town, Kalispell has fallen to darkness. With the world corrupted by Blightblooms and most of humanity wiped out, only a few of the surivors left to fend for themselves they must live and learn to survives the new world full engulfed in darkness.

Explore the abandoned streets, search for supplies, trade with other survivors, and uncover what is left of this devastated city.

Restore Your Home

Build, repair, and expand your home. Recruit companions, manage survivors, and explore new areas.

Low on supplies? Use nearby facilities to craft the resources you need to survive.

Survives The Endless Night

In this world, night never ends.
The Blight and its fiends roam freely in the darkness, hunting anything that moves. Always be prepared to fight or run if necessary

Each enemy has a unique strengths, weaknesses, and behaviors. Observe, adapt, and outsmart them while fighting to protect your home.
